compatibility_report:
# Compatibility Report
- Name of the game with compatibility issues: **New World**
- Steam AppID of the game: `1063730`

## System Information
- GPU: GTX 3060
- Driver/LLVM version: nvidia: 510.60.02 / llvm-config: 13.0.1
- Kernel version: 5.15.32-1-MANJARO
- [System Gist](https://gist.github.com/masonnl/be147f37ae32045a2d4b784ca4acaaec)
- Proton version: Proton [7.0-1](https://github.com/ValveSoftware/Proton/releases/tag/proton-7.0-1)
- GE version [7-14](https://github.com/GloriousEggroll/proton-ge-custom/releases/tag/GE-Proton7-14)
- Proton logfile cannot be uploaded. It exploded to 280MB when created so instead I took the head of the first 10k lines here: [steam-1063730-head10k.log](https://github.com/ValveSoftware/Proton/files/8502632/steam-1063730-head10k.log)
  - _EDIT: here's my compressed logfile taken from [my comment below](https://github.com/ValveSoftware/Proton/issues/5772#issuecomment-1101524196): [steam-1063730.log.zip](https://github.com/ValveSoftware/Proton/files/8506717/steam-1063730.log.zip)_

## I confirm:
- [x] that I haven't found an existing compatibility report for this game.
- [x] that I have checked whether there are updates for my system available.
- [x] EAC support has been added to the game's directory under `EasyAntiCheat/easyanticheat_x64.so` and connects successfully as shown in the EAC logs generated under `~/.cache/com.epicgames.easyanticheat/271/loader.log`. I have been able to play upwards of 10+ hours in the last few days (with crashes as described below).

## Symptoms
- **[[RESOLVED](https://github.com/ValveSoftware/Proton/issues/5772#issuecomment-1102096272)]** ~Except in the rare occasion when the game actually loads, it will simply crash to desktop while loading into a character (see STR below).~
- Stuttering on various settings (even low) with resolution at 1920x1080
  - Playing at full native resolution of 2560x1440 ran fine and was locked at 60fps (with the same amount of stuttering)

## Steps to Reproduce
Scenario 1:
- Hit Play in Steam
- Log in to character
- Loading screen...
- :boom: back to desktop
  - :warning: Very rarely the game will load in and I can play. I have not modified shader files or compat files. It will sometimes just work :shrug: 

Scenario 2:
- Hit play in Steam
- Create new character
- Play completely through the tutorial zone and get into the main world with other players. This seems to have worked for me 2/2 times, but I obviously don't want to do to that :D The first time I did it, I played for a few hours without issue (other than stutters).
symptom_summary:
用户在加载角色时，游戏经常崩溃到桌面，偶尔能够成功加载并进行游戏，但在各种设置下出现卡顿现象，即使在低设置和1080p分辨率下也存在问题。 

Tags: Crash, Stuttering, Loading Issues, Performance Problems

compatibility_report:
# Compatibility Report
- Name of the game with compatibility issues: Windjammers 2
- Steam AppID of the game: 1114290

## System Information
- GPU: Steam Deck's Aerith APU
- Video driver version: Mesa 23.1.3.170235.radeonsi_3.5.1-1 
- Kernel version: 6.1.52-valve2-1-neptune-61
- Link to full system information report as [Gist](https://gist.github.com/): [Okay, here you go.](https://gist.github.com/HugLifeTiZ/9cc00c4864bb54a5ee9484b8fe53b814)
- Proton version: 8.0-4

## I confirm:
- [x] that I haven't found an existing compatibility report for this game.
- [x] that I have checked whether there are updates for my system available.

<!-- Please add `PROTON_LOG=1 %command%` to the game's launch options and
attach the generated $HOME/steam-$APPID.log to this issue report as a file.
(Proton logs compress well if needed.)-->

[steam-1114290.log](https://github.com/ValveSoftware/Proton/files/12873057/steam-1114290.log)

## Symptoms <!-- What's the problem? -->
When using the default (presumably Direct3D) version of Windjammers 2 on a Steam Deck instead of the OpenGL version, either the following assertion dialog appears, or it freezes up on a black screen. (I grabbed the screenshot of the dialog from the SoulCalibur VI issue, because I can't get it to appear anymore since going to Desktop and coming back.)

![Assertion dialog](https://github.com/ValveSoftware/Proton/assets/4130673/e18029ac-21ca-4eb7-9df3-d53e2f24868f)

Removing the compatdata for the game doesn't make any difference. The OpenGL version isn't *quite* at parity; stage art doesn't appear in that version, and there may be other issues I'm not remembering at the moment.

## Reproduction
Start Windjammers 2 on a Steam Deck on 3.5 with the default version, not the OpenGL version.

<!--
1. You can find the Steam AppID in the URL of the shop page of the game.
   e.g. for `The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt` the AppID is `292030`.
2. You can find your driver and Linux version, as well as your graphics
   processor's name in the system information report of Steam.
3. You can retrieve a full system information report by clicking
   `Help` > `System Information` in the Steam client on your machine.
4. Please copy it to your clipboard by pressing `Ctrl+A` and then `Ctrl+C`.
   Then paste it in a [Gist](https://gist.github.com/) and post the link in
   this issue.
5. Also, please copy the contents of `Help` > `Steam Runtime Information` to
   the gist.
6. Please search for open issues and pull requests by the name of the game and
   find out whether they are relevant and should be referenced above.
-->
symptom_summary:
用户在Steam Deck上运行《Windjammers 2》时，使用默认的Direct3D版本会出现断言对话框，或者在黑屏上冻结。切换到OpenGL版本后，虽然能够启动，但某些舞台艺术缺失，且可能还有其他未记得的问题。

**Tag Suggestions:** 
- Crash
- Freeze
- Black Screen
- Missing Features

issue_title: Spelunky 2: Renderer error creating DXGI factory (0x80004005)
compatibility_report:
# Compatibility Report
- Name of the game with compatibility issues: Spelunky 2
- Steam AppID of the game: 418530

## System Information
- GPU: GP106 [GeForce GTX 1060 3GB]
- Driver/LLVM version: <!-- e.g. Mesa 18.2/7.0.0 or nvidia 396.54 -->
- Kernel version: 5.14.14
- Link to full system information report as [Gist](https://gist.github.com/KSXGitHub/cc93cfbd49dd6b19e0f16a3d8da24223):
- Proton version: Proton Experimental

## I confirm:
- [x] that I haven't found an existing compatibility report for this game.
- [x] that I have checked whether there are updates for my system available.

<!-- Please add `PROTON_LOG=1 %command%` to the game's launch options and
attach the generated $HOME/steam-$APPID.log to this issue report as a file.
(Proton logs compress well if needed.)-->

## Symptoms <!-- What's the problem? -->

The game does not launch. Instead, an error message box appears:

"Renderer error creating DXGI factory (0x80004005)"

## Reproduction

Enable Steam Play and launch the game.

## Additional information

> `sudo lshw -C display`

```
  *-display                 
       description: VGA compatible controller
       product: GP106 [GeForce GTX 1060 3GB]
       vendor: NVIDIA Corporation
       physical id: 0
       bus info: pci@0000:82:00.0
       version: a1
       width: 64 bits
       clock: 33MHz
       capabilities: pm msi pciexpress vga_controller bus_master cap_list rom
       configuration: driver=nouveau latency=0
       resources: irq:54 memory:fa000000-faffffff memory:e0000000-efffffff memory:f0000000-f1ffffff ioport:f000(size=128) memory:c0000-dffff
```
symptom_summary:
用户在尝试启动《Spelunky 2》时遇到问题，游戏无法启动，并出现错误信息框：“Renderer error creating DXGI factory (0x80004005)”。 

Tags: Game Launch Failure, Error Message, DXGI Error
